canonical_definition: The observable reduction in performance variation when input formatting is altered, such as changes in passage order or identifier labels, indicating resistance to spurious cues.

relationships.evidence: From this perspective, we identify two unique objectives: (1) Informativeness—maximizing the training information available for data-scarce learning, and (2) Bias Mitigation—minimizing potential biases that may arise from limited data (Section 2.3).
